title: ImageEval 2026 — Ayn-VQA Task 1c: Hallucination Detection (English)
description: Given an image and 3 statements (English), label EACH statement True (grounded in the image) or False (hallucinated). Exactly one statement is grounded. Part of the ImageEval 2026 Ayn-VQA shared task on cultural grounding in Arabic multimodal understanding. Data on HuggingFace (QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA). Please also register at https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd1QKF4rXD_gbLJlDykLvB0DGMIogwhraeOtWRiQiotucK0zA/viewform
description_zh:
I appreciate you sharing information about the ImageEval 2026 Ayn-VQA shared task, but I don't see an image attached to your message. 

To help you label the three statements as True or False, I would need:

1. **The image** - Please upload or attach the image file
2. **The 3 statements** - Please provide the English statements you'd like me to evaluate

Once you provide both, I'll be happy to:
- Analyze each statement against the image content
- Label each as **True** (grounded in the image) or **False** (hallucinated)
- Identify which one statement is grounded in the image

Please share the image and statements, and I'll assist you with the evaluation.

pages.title: Participation
pages.content:
# How to participate

**ImageEval 2026 — Ayn-VQA Task 1c: Hallucination Detection (English)** — the **English** track of Task 1c
(Hallucination Detection), part of the [ImageEval 2026](https://imageeval2026.github.io/) shared task on cultural
grounding in Arabic multimodal generation and understanding.

Given an image and 3 statements (English), label EACH statement True (grounded in the image) or False (hallucinated). Exactly one statement is grounded.

## Register (please do this first)
Fill in the **[registration form](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd1QKF4rXD_gbLJlDykLvB0DGMIogwhraeOtWRiQiotucK0zA/viewform)** — it lets the organisers track
participants and notify you about data, deadlines, and any updates.

## Who can join
Individuals or teams; one member submits on the team's behalf. You may enter more
than one track.

## Steps
1. Sign up on this Codabench page **and** the [registration form](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd1QKF4rXD_gbLJlDykLvB0DGMIogwhraeOtWRiQiotucK0zA/viewform).
2. Read the **Terms** tab — note the exact prediction format.
3. Get the data from the Hugging Face Hub: **[QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA](https://huggingface.co/datasets/QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA)**.
4. Follow the task description in the [tasks repo](https://github.com/ImageEval2026/ImageEval2026-tasks).
5. Predict on **devtest** during the development phase, and on **test** during the
   final-evaluation phase.

## System description paper
All teams are encouraged to submit a system-description paper for the workshop.

## Contact
imageeval2026@gmail.com
pages.content_zh:
# 参与方式

**ImageEval 2026 — Ayn-VQA 任务1c：幻觉检测（英文）** — 任务1c（幻觉检测）的**英文**赛道，属于[ImageEval 2026](https://imageeval2026.github.io/)共享任务，主要关于阿拉伯多模态生成和理解中的文化基础。

给定一张图像和3条陈述（英文），为每条陈述标注为真（基于图像）或假（幻觉）。恰好有一条陈述基于图像。

## 注册（请先完成）
填写**[注册表](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd1QKF4rXD_gbLJlDykLvB0DGMIogwhraeOtWRiQiotucK0zA/viewform)** — 这样组织方可以追踪参赛者，并通知您有关数据、截止日期和任何更新。

## 谁可以参加
个人或团队；由一名成员代表团队提交。您可以参加多个赛道。

## 步骤
1. 在此Codabench页面**和**[注册表](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd1QKF4rXD_gbLJlDykLvB0DGMIogwhraeOtWRiQiotucK0zA/viewform)上注册。
2. 阅读**Terms**选项卡 — 注意准确的预测格式。
3. 从Hugging Face Hub获取数据：**[QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA](https://huggingface.co/datasets/QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA)**。
4. 遵循[任务仓库](https://github.com/ImageEval2026/ImageEval2026-tasks)中的任务描述。
5. 在开发阶段对**devtest**进行预测，在最终评估阶段对**test**进行预测。

## 系统描述论文
鼓励所有团队为研讨会提交系统描述论文。

## 联系方式
imageeval2026@gmail.com

pages.title: Dataset
pages.content:
# Dataset

All splits live on the Hugging Face Hub — **[QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA](https://huggingface.co/datasets/QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA)** — as config
`task1c_en`. This competition scores **devtest** (development phase) and **test**
(final phase).

```python
from datasets import load_dataset
ds = load_dataset("QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA", "task1c_en", split="devtest")
```

## Splits

| split | labels | items | phase | purpose |
|---|---|---:|---|---|
| `train`   | yes | 3000 | development | training / fine-tuning |
| `dev`     | yes | 500  | development | local validation |
| `devtest` | no  | 500  | development (leaderboard) | submission target, dev phase |
| `test`    | no  | 1000 | final evaluation | blind ranking (human-recorded audio) |

- **Language:** English.
- Media (images / audio) are referenced by **relative path** keyed on `id`.
- Task 1c is image + text only (no audio): three statements, exactly one grounded.

## Licence
CC BY-NC 4.0 — non-commercial research use only.
pages.content_zh:
# 数据集

所有分割都在Hugging Face Hub上——**[QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA](https://huggingface.co/datasets/QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA)**——作为配置`task1c_en`。此竞赛对**devtest**（开发阶段）和**test**（最终阶段）进行评分。

```python
from datasets import load_dataset
ds = load_dataset("QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA", "task1c_en", split="devtest")
```

## 分割

| 分割 | 标签 | 项目数 | 阶段 | 用途 |
|---|---|---:|---|---|
| `train`   | 有 | 3000 | 开发 | 训练/微调 |
| `dev`     | 有 | 500  | 开发 | 本地验证 |
| `devtest` | 无  | 500  | 开发（排行榜） | 提交目标，开发阶段 |
| `test`    | 无  | 1000 | 最终评估 | 盲测排名（人工录制音频） |

- **语言：** 英语。
- 媒体（图像/音频）由**相对路径**通过`id`键引用。
- 任务1c仅包含图像和文本（无音频）：三个陈述句，恰好一个有根据的。

## 许可证
CC BY-NC 4.0——仅限非商业研究使用。

pages.title: Timeline
pages.content:
# Timeline

## Development phase
Tune on `train` + `dev`; submit predictions on **devtest** for the leaderboard.

**Window:** `2026-05-22 → 2026-07-19`  ·  up to 5 submissions/day, 100 total.

## Testing phase
The blind **test** set is released on [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/datasets/QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA); submit predictions
on `test` for the official ranking.

**Window:** `2026-07-20 → 2026-07-29`  ·  up to 20 submissions/day, 100 total.

> Dates are set in `competition.yaml` (`phases.start` / `phases.end`) — adjust if
> the schedule shifts. Announcements: [website](https://imageeval2026.github.io/).
pages.content_zh:
# 时间表

## 开发阶段
在 `train` + `dev` 上进行调优；在 **devtest** 上提交预测以获得排行榜排名。

**时间窗口：** `2026-05-22 → 2026-07-19`  ·  每天最多 5 次提交，总计 100 次。

## 测试阶段
盲测 **test** 集在 [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/datasets/QCRI/ImageEval2026-Task1-AynVQA) 上发布；在 `test` 上提交预测以获得官方排名。

**时间窗口：** `2026-07-20 → 2026-07-29`  ·  每天最多 20 次提交，总计 100 次。

> 日期设置在 `competition.yaml`（`phases.start` / `phases.end`）中—— 如时间表有变更请调整。公告：[网站](https://imageeval2026.github.io/)。
